message:
Command `
echo "=== FINAL DIRECTORY APPEARED! $(date) ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Final directory contents ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/final/"

echo ""
echo "=== GDS ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null || ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/final/klayout_gds/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== LEF ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/final/lef/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== LIB ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/final/lib/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== ODB ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/final/odb/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== All run steps (last 15) ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -20

echo ""
echo "=== Final metrics ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/final/metrics.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
keys_of_interest = [k for k in d if any(x in k.lower() for x in ['wns','tns','wire','vio','drc','power','area','instance'])]
for k in sorted(keys_of_interest)[:30]:
    print(f'  {k}: {d[k]}')
" 2>/dev/null || cat "$RUN_DIR/final/metrics.json" 2>/dev/null | head -50
` executed with exit code 0.
